name: @formbricks/surveys
description: Formbricks-surveys is a helper library to embed surveys into your application.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "ESM,UMD" "vite build --watch --mode dev" "BUILD_UMD=true vite build --watch --mode dev"
scripts.build: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 vite build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 BUILD_UMD=true vite build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.build:analyze: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 ANALYZE=true vite build && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.build:dev: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 vite build --mode dev && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.go: concurrently -n "ESM,UMD" "vite build --watch --mode dev" "BUILD_UMD=true vite build --watch --mode dev"
scripts.i18n:generate: npx lingo.dev@latest run && npx lingo.dev@latest lockfile --force
